title: Vilfa compressa
intro: Vilfa compressa, also known as wheat grass or wheat grass plant, is a type of grass that belongs to the wheat family (Poaceae). The health benefits of Vilfa compressa include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immune-boosting properties, which can help to reduce stress, improve digestion, and support overall well-being.
